title: EiSoCraft Modpack I [OFFICIAL]
description:
The first official modpack of the Server EiSoCraft.

Mainly Create focused with some new structures and food.
body:
This is the official modpack for the server EiSoCraft. But you can play it also with your friends on a private server or in singleplayer.


It is mainly Create focused with many automation like automating diamonds or netherite (Not Easy). 
Food from Farmers Delight and its addons is also there.
OP-Stuff from El Enders Cataclysm and structures from Integrated Dungeons and Structures is also in this modpack.
